name: yt2md
description: Extract YouTube transcripts as Markdown with clickable timestamps — CLI over yt-dlp with batch, search, date filtering, resume and retry/backoff.

components.name: CLI
components.description: Batch orchestration, search, date filtering, resume, retry/backoff.

components.name: Subtitle fetcher
components.description: yt-dlp interaction: URL expansion, subtitle download, json3 parsing.

components.name: Markdown renderer
components.description: Timestamps, headers, transcript paragraphs to Markdown.

components.name: Transcript store
components.description: Output directory of generated .md transcripts; also drives resume.

components.name: Test suite
components.description: pytest suite over parsing and rendering.

external_services.name: YouTube
external_services.description: Source of videos and auto-generated subtitles (json3), fetched via yt-dlp.

flows.name: Single video → Markdown
flows.description: One URL in, one timestamped .md out.

flows.name: Channel batch with resume
flows.description: Expand a channel/playlist, skip already-done videos, fetch the rest with retry/backoff.

x_extensions.notes: yt-dlp requires a deno runtime for YouTube JS challenges; never use en.* sub-language wildcards (triggers 429).
